_comments: Bridge provider registry for the Realtime Bridges subsystem. Each row connects the single realtime agent engine to an external endpoint — a meeting (Zoom/Teams/Meet/Webex/Slack/Discord/LiveKit/RingCentral) or a phone call (Twilio/Vonage/RingCentral). SupportedFeatures encodes the per-platform capability matrix from /plans/realtime/realtime-bridges-architecture.md §8 as an IBridgeProviderFeatures JSON string (omitted flag = not supported). STATUS POLICY: Loopback and Zoom are 'Active' — their drivers exist (LoopbackBridge in @memberjunction/ai-bridge-server; ZoomBridge in @memberjunction/ai-bridge-zoom). Every other provider is 'Disabled': the row populates the registry/dashboard and captures the capability matrix, but sessions cannot start until that platform's driver lands. Flip to 'Active' as each driver ships. IDs are assigned by mj-sync on first push — primaryKey/sync intentionally omitted.

fields.Name: Loopback
fields.Description: In-memory echo bridge for development and testing. Loops the agent's outbound audio back as inbound with no external platform. The only provider whose driver exists today.

fields.Name: Zoom
fields.Description: Zoom Meetings bridge. Built first, end-to-end — the reference driver the others subclass. Full meeting AV plus marketplace native-invite.

fields.Name: Microsoft Teams
fields.Description: Microsoft Teams meeting bridge. Full meeting AV plus marketplace native-invite; calendar invite via the agent's Microsoft 365 identity.

fields.Name: Google Meet
fields.Description: Google Meet bridge. On-demand and scheduled joins need verification; calendar invite via the agent's Google Workspace identity is the headline path.

fields.Name: Cisco Webex
fields.Description: Cisco Webex meeting bridge. Major enterprise platform (finance, healthcare, government, education). Full meeting AV via the Webex bot/embedded-app SDK.

fields.Name: Slack
fields.Description: Slack huddle bridge — full audio + video + screen share (huddles run on Amazon Chime). Gating unknown: confirm a public join-with-media path to huddles before promoting from Disabled.

fields.Name: Discord
fields.Description: Discord voice-channel bridge. First-class voice channels and a mature bot API make media access easy. Strong for community, education, gaming, and some business use.

fields.Name: RingCentral
fields.Description: RingCentral UCaaS bridge — exercises both meeting and telephony families through one driver. Full meeting AV plus outbound dial, inbound routing, DTMF, and call transfer.

fields.Name: Twilio
fields.Description: Twilio CPaaS telephony bridge (lead telephony provider). Inbound DID routing, outbound dial, DTMF, and call transfer over voice. Audio only — no video or screen.

fields.Name: Vonage
fields.Description: Vonage CPaaS telephony bridge. Inbound DID routing, outbound dial, DTMF, and call transfer over voice. Audio only — no video or screen.

fields.Name: LiveKit
fields.Description: LiveKit MJ-native room bridge — an SFU we run ourselves rather than connect out to. Open-source, self-hostable, with existing OpenAI/Gemini realtime adapters. Full multi-party AV in an MJ-owned room.
